'''Pa'aal''' was the primary [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[N'zoth]] in the [[N'zoth system/Legends|N'zoth system]].

==History==
The moon of [[N'zoth]], Pa'aal was controlled by the [[Duskhan League]]. When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] established a base on the moon, housing the [[Sixth Negative Regions|Black Sword Command]], the [[Yevetha]]ns attacked the base and established a [[Prison/Legends|prisoner]]-of-war and [[Slavery/Legends|slave labor]] camp to hold the Imperial prisoners.<ref name="CSWE" />
